data.title: harvest-worktree.sh: merge conflict exits code 1 with no diagnostic output -> conflict files unknown without manual debugging
data.description:
## Actual Behavior
`harvest-worktree.sh` exits code 1 silently when `git merge --no-commit` encounters conflicts. The cleanup trap aborts the merge and exits, producing no output about which files conflicted.

## Expected Behavior
When merge conflicts are found, the script should print: 'Merge conflicts in: <file list>. Resolve manually then commit.' before exiting, so the caller knows what to fix.

## Root Cause
In harvest-worktree.sh, `set +e` is used around `git merge --no-commit`, and the conflict check uses `git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U`. However, when the merge itself fails (non-zero exit), the ERR trap fires immediately and calls `git merge --abort` before the conflict file check can run.

## Impact
During epic 0b6c-08ba sprint (2026-04-12), harvest of T2 worktree (worktree-agent-a857fdf4) produced exit code 1 with no output. Required running `bash -x harvest-worktree.sh ...` to identify conflicts in dso-config.conf and test-preplanning-noninteractive-checkpoints.sh.

## Fix
Before the ERR trap fires, capture conflicted files and print them. Or restructure to avoid ERR trap on the merge command.
